items.author: bendee983@gmail.com (Ben Dickson)

items.title: Google PM open-sources Always On Memory Agent, ditching vector databases for LLM-driven persistent memory
items.summary: Google senior AI product manager Shubham Saboo has turned one of the thorniest problems in agent design into an open-source engineering exercise: persistent memory. items.title: Sony appears to be testing dynamic pricing on PlayStation games
items.summary: A site called PSprices has been tracking prices on Sony's digital game store and noticed something unusual: some games were being offered at different prices to different users. What's more, those offers are tracked in the PlayStation API with experiment identifiers like IPT_PILOT and IPT_OPR_TESTIN

items.title: Vizio accounts are becoming Walmart accounts
items.summary: Walmart bought Vizio in 2024, and now it's taking the next steps to formally fold the TV maker into itself by phasing out Vizio accounts.
